revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 32x32 pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, one 32x32 frame only. Solid #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background filling all empty space; no alpha transparency, no gradients.

Asset: top-down Japanese fantasy RPG field prop overlay representing the shadowed water beneath a wooden bridge, compressed clearly into a single 32x32 prop cell. Draw a horizontal dark shadow band across blue-green flowing river water, as if it sits under a bridge deck. The north/top edge of the shadow is harder and straighter; the south/bottom edge feathers downward with stepped pixel clusters. Include deep teal-blue river ripple lines visible through the shadow. Add a few small dark horizontal plank-underside shadow strips. Darkest shadow near left and right post areas, medium dark through the main span.

Style constraints: crisp SNES-like 16-bit pixel art, low-resolution hard pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright but readable palette, top-left light source, one-pixel dark outline where useful, clear collision footprint, single coherent object centered in the frame. Use colors close to #1a2818 for shadow, #2a4a68 for deep water, #3d6e8a for teal ripple accents.

Containment and cleanliness: keep every non-magenta pixel inside the single 32x32 cell with a clear solid #FF00FF margin on all edges. No cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, logos, UI, watermark, characters, creatures, modern objects, weapons, armor, helmets, emblems, horror mood, or detached pixel fragments. No isolated dust specks, leftover residue, or stray islands.
